name: pdf-monster
description: Analyze PDFs as agent-readable text, OCR text, page render images, and embedded image files without polluting the working directory.

interface.shortDescription: Read PDFs through text, OCR, page images, and extracted figures
interface.longDescription: PDF Monster helps Codex inspect PDFs by converting them into structured, agent-readable evidence: per-page text, optional OCR text, rendered page images, and extracted embedded images. It keeps generated artifacts out of the user's working directory unless persistence is explicitly requested.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this PDF with PDF Monster
Extract PDF text, OCR, and visual evidence
